note: Wide smooth barrier-free paths, free loaner wheelchairs, lifts to every level of the Cloud Forest, accessible Garden Shuttle; free outdoor gardens + Garden Rhapsody light show with priority mobility zones. A top family + accessibility pick.
Observation deck reached by elevators with accessible restrooms; panoramic skyline views. The connected mall and Helix Bridge are also fully accessible.

Accessible island resort - trams, monorail, pathways and major attractions (Universal Studios, S.E.A. Aquarium) designed for access, with beach wheelchairs at Siloso Beach. A fully accessible day out for families.
Fully wheelchair accessible with free tram rides that have wheelchair slots, priority viewing at some shows, and wheelchair/scooter rentals. Spacious, landscaped and superb for families.
UNESCO site with accessible boardwalks, flat well-maintained paths, free wheelchair rentals and the National Orchid Garden; benches and picnic spots. Tranquil and easy.
The city's most photographed landmark; barrier-free paths and accessible viewing platforms for the Marina Bay skyline shot. Accessible restrooms nearby at One Fullerton.
Giant observation wheel; spacious air-conditioned capsules fit multiple wheelchairs with barrier-free boarding and priority access. Great views day or night.
More accessible than expected - MRT-connected, Heritage Centre and hawker food (Maxwell, Chinatown Food Street) largely accessible, though a few older shopfronts have a step. Great food.
All galleries wheelchair accessible with accessible parking, free wheelchair rentals and sensory bags for children on the autism spectrum. Good rainy-day option.
Riverside dining precinct (MRT accessible); the bumboat river cruises are accessible for FOLDING wheelchairs with assistance but power chairs are challenging - book ahead and check with the operator.
